title: Across the Pacific
writer: Charles E. Blaney, Darryl F. Zanuck
actors: Monte Blue, Jane Winton, Myrna Loy
plot: Following the Spanish-American War, a soldier is given the assignment of finding the leader of a band of rebels in the Phillipines. To do this, he must romance Roma, a cabaret spy working for the rebels. This does not please his c...
